book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free wifi and should be in the north
The hotel should have a star of 4
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 1 people and 4 nights starting from sunday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called grafton hotel restaurant
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 11:15 on the same day
If the booking fails how about 10:15
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
